name: Some Spring Days
short_description: This is the story of the ordinary children who fell when Japan took fatal tumbles. 40 illustrations. 7 music. This is a visual novel game that takes about 20 minutes to play.
detailed_description:
Every day I go to a nearby school and meet my friends is fun.

Nothing particularly bad, nothing particularly good.

The ordinary me lived an ordinary life, and it was a fun life in its own way.

However, there is an elusive sense of incongruity that arises from the gaps in the peaceful daily life.

What should I do when the era repeats only superficial answers to sincere questions.

In the other school building where my legs were somehow turned, the sound of the piano was ringing.

This is the story of the ordinary children who fell when Japan took fatal tumbles.

40 illustrations. 7 music. This is a visual novel game that takes about 20 minutes to play.

supported_languages: Japanese, English, French, German, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
